# 贝奈利全球奢石中心 / Wharton Luxury Stone

> Wharton Luxury Stone Center — a premium supplier of natural luxury stones (marble, sintered stone) based in China, serving global markets. The catalog features 200+ selected natural stones including Blue Emerald, Pandora, Fendi White, Bulgari, Calacatta and more, used for dining tables, tea tables, feature walls and raw slabs.

## About
- Company: 贝奈利全球奢石中心 / Wharton Luxury Stone
- Products: Natural luxury stones (奢石), marble, sintered stone
- Materials: Blue Emerald (蓝翡翠), Pandora (潘多拉), Fendi White (芬迪白), Bulgari (宝格丽), Calacatta, and 195+ more varieties
- Applications: Dining tables, round tables, tea tables, feature walls, console tables, raw slabs
- Stone count: 200+ selected stones across 40+ categories
- Contact: +86 13923130743 | apple@whartonstone.com

## Available Languages
- 中文 (Chinese): https://www.sinteredstoneworld.com/
- English: https://www.sinteredstoneworld.com/en/
- Español (Spanish): https://www.sinteredstoneworld.com/es/
- Русский (Russian): https://www.sinteredstoneworld.com/ru/
